title: Endocrine and Metabolic Core Vocabulary v1
source: project-curated high-frequency endocrine/metabolic disease phenotype and biomarker checklist

items.label: prediabetes
items.ambiguity_notes: Prediabetes is a risk state and should not be expanded to established type 2 diabetes without explicit wording.

items.label: body mass index
items.ambiguity_notes: BMI is an anthropometric index, not a disease.

items.label: low HDL cholesterol
items.preferred_zh: 低高密度脂蛋白胆固醇
items.ambiguity_notes: HDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without low/high context.
expected_terms: 低高密度脂蛋白胆固醇

items.label: high LDL cholesterol
items.preferred_zh: 高低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
items.ambiguity_notes: LDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without low/high context.
expected_terms: 高低密度脂蛋白胆固醇

items.label: metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease
items.preferred_zh: 代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝病
en_synonyms: metabolic dysfunction associated steatotic liver disease
expected_terms: 代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝病
metabolic dysfunction associated steatotic liver disease

items.label: Hashimoto thyroiditis
zh_synonyms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎
items.ambiguity_notes: Hashimoto thyroiditis can cause hypothyroidism but should not be collapsed into hypothyroidism.
expected_terms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎

items.label: Graves disease
items.ambiguity_notes: Graves disease is related to hyperthyroidism but should not be collapsed into hyperthyroidism.

items.label: thyroid nodule
items.ambiguity_notes: Thyroid nodule is not automatically thyroid cancer.

items.label: Addison disease
zh_synonyms: 原发性肾上腺皮质功能减退
expected_terms: 原发性肾上腺皮质功能减退

items.label: adiponectin
items.ambiguity_notes: Adiponectin is an adipokine biomarker, not a disease.

items.label: triiodothyronine
items.ambiguity_notes: T3 is a short token; runtime matching requires token boundary.

items.label: thyroxine
items.ambiguity_notes: T4 is a short token; runtime matching requires token boundary.

items.label: free triiodothyronine
items.preferred_zh: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
expected_terms: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸

items.label: thyroid peroxidase antibody
items.preferred_zh: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
zh_synonyms: 抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
expected_terms: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体

ambiguity_terms.policy: map only as exact token for type 1 diabetes
map only as exact token for type 2 diabetes
require token boundary; do not match STAT3 or similar strings
require token boundary; do not match unrelated alphanumeric strings
biomarker/phenotype only, not obesity by itself
biomarker token; low HDL is phenotype
biomarker token; high LDL is phenotype
do not expand to HCC or LIHC
do not expand to HCC or LIHC
do not expand to HCC or LIHC
